---
title: "Newton Interpolation Polynomial"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

Source inspiration: [Numerical Methods Modules](https://web.archive.org/web/20190808102217/http://mathfaculty.fullerton.edu/mathews/n2003/NumericalUndergradMod.html).

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Newton Interpolation Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/n2003/NewtonPolyMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 4
- Unique animation portals: 1

### Animation Portals

1. [Newton Polynomials](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 29

### Animation Items

1. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange01/Lagrangeaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange01/Lagrangeaa.gif
2. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange02/Lagrangebb.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
3. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange03/Lagrangecc.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
4. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange04/Lagrangedd.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange04/Lagrangedd.gif
5. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange05/Lagrangeee.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
6. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange06/Lagrangeff.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
7. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange07/Lagrangegg.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
8. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange08/Lagrangehh.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange08/Lagrangehh.gif
9. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange09/Lagrangeii.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
10. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange10/Lagrangejj.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
11. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange11/Lagrangekk.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
12. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange12/Lagrangell.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange12/Lagrangell.gif
13. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange13/Lagrangemm.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
14. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange14/Lagrangenn.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
15. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange15/Lagrangeoo.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
16. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange16/Lagrangepp.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
17. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange17/Lagrangeqq.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
18. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange18/Lagrangerr.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
19. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange19/Lagrangess.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
20. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange20/Lagrangett.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
21. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange21/Lagrangeuu.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
22. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange22/Lagrangevv.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
23. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange23/Lagrangeww.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
24. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange24/Lagrangexx.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
25. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange25/Lagrangeyy.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
26. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange26/Lagrangezz.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
27. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange27/Lagrangeaaa.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
28. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange28/Lagrangebbb.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
29. [Lagrange & Newton Polynomial](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Lagrange/Lagrange29/Lagrangeccc.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
